title: Savory Smoky Moroccan Eggplant Zaalouk
description: A traditional Moroccan dish featuring eggplant, dry sherry, and a blend of aromatic spices, perfect for a cozy dinner
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit
Cut the eggplant into 1 inch cubes and place them on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper
Drizzle the olive oil over the eggplant and sprinkle with salt and black pepper
Roast the eggplant in the oven for 30 minutes, or until it is tender and lightly browned
In a large skillet, heat the dry sherry over medium heat and add the chopped onion
Cook the onion for 5 minutes, or until it is translucent and starting to caramelize
Add the minced garlic, ground cumin, and smoked paprika to the skillet and cook for 1 minute
Stir in the crushed tomatoes and bring the mixture to a simmer
Add the roasted eggplant to the skillet and stir to combine
Reduce the heat to low and let the zaalouk simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally
